title: Evidence capture dirty context stays reviewable
description: Protects intended, unrelated, and unknown changed-file reporting plus command proof provenance in krn evidence capture.

cases.title: intended and unrelated dirty files are separated

input.gitStatus: package cwd paths plus root-parent report directory and unrelated raw material

expectedBehavior.subject: evidence_capture:dirty_context_classification
expectedBehavior.rationale: Evidence capture must make intended and unrelated dirty files visible so review burden is explicit.

protectedFailureModes.title: dirty context is collapsed into a flat changed-file list
protectedFailureModes.mustNot: Evidence capture must not mix intended files, unrelated dirty files, and command proof into an undifferentiated output.
protectedFailureModes.detection: CLI output omits intended/unrelated/unknown groups or fails to warn when unrelated dirty files are present.

cases.title: missing intended files keeps changes unknown and default proof weak

input.gitStatus: package cwd changed file without intended-file input

expectedBehavior.subject: evidence_capture:unknown_and_weak_default_proof
expectedBehavior.rationale: When no intended files or verification outcomes are supplied, changed files must remain unclassified and default command rows must stay weak proof.

protectedFailureModes.title: unknown files or weak default proof are hidden
protectedFailureModes.mustNot: Evidence capture must not treat unclassified changed files as intended or default_template command rows as command proof.
protectedFailureModes.detection: CLI output omits unknown classification or omits the weak default_template provenance warning.
